name: Dream
signature: Angel Reese homecoming era — traded from Chicago, now leading the Dream.

name: Sky
signature: Post-Angel rebuild. The Reese era ended; new identity coming.

name: Sun
signature: Mohegan Sun Arena vibe. DeWanna Bonner, scrappy but small-market.

name: Wings
signature: Paige Bueckers + Arike Ogunbowale = best backcourt in the W.

name: Valkyries
signature: 2025 expansion team. Bay Area culture, immediate sellouts at Chase Center.

name: Fever
signature: Caitlin Clark's team. Single-handedly tripled WNBA TV ratings.

name: Aces
signature: A'ja Wilson + Becky Hammon's dynasty. Back-to-back champions energy.

name: Sparks
signature: Cameron Brink + Kelsey Plum + Rickea Jackson — the rebuild looks fun.

name: Lynx
signature: Napheesa Collier era. Cheryl Reeve coaching legend status.

name: Liberty
signature: Sabrina + Stewie + Jonquel = reigning superteam. Barclays ownership pressure.

name: Mercury
signature: Post-Diana Taurasi era. Brittney Griner's chapter closing.

name: Fire
signature: 2026 expansion team. Pacific Northwest hoops obsession reborn.

name: Storm
signature: Sue Bird's legacy franchise. Skylar Diggins-Smith era.

name: Tempo
signature: 2026 expansion. Canada's first WNBA team — instant cultural moment.

name: Mystics
signature: Elena Delle Donne legacy team. Building around young core.
